routes.success: HTTP 200 escaped consent HTML or HTTP 302 /login?next=consent URL
routes.validation: HTTPS non-empty *.chromiumapp.org hostname; exact configured extension ID outside safe localhost development
routes.authorization: no key mint or other product write; missing/expired session restarts login
routes.failure: HTTP 400 invalid redirect/configuration; HTTP 500 persistence failure

routes.validation: bounded application/x-www-form-urlencoded; Sec-Fetch-Site present must be same-origin, otherwise Origin must equal WEB_URL
routes.authorization: session actor owns minted key; expired session restarts at login/consent
routes.idempotency_retry: non-idempotent random UUID; maximum ten user keys in strict trailing hour

routes.authentication: 36-character API key takes precedence, otherwise host-only browser session
routes.success: {success:false} when authenticated by session without bearer; otherwise actor-owned digest delete and {success:true}
routes.authorization: delete predicate binds both resolved actor and key digest
routes.idempotency_retry: physical delete is retry-safe after an independently valid actor remains
routes.failure: HTTP 401 missing actor; HTTP 500 persistence failure

routes.authentication: 36-character API key takes precedence, otherwise host-only browser session
routes.success: {user,organization,plan}; free maxRecordingSeconds=300, Pro=null; dangling pointer repaired
routes.validation: live actor, live organization, bounded lossless name and owner subscription projection
routes.authorization: active owned organization, then deterministic owned fallback, then oldest live membership
routes.idempotency_retry: deterministic selection and convergent active-pointer repair
routes.failure: HTTP 401 missing actor; HTTP 500 missing organization, corruption, or persistence failure

security_corrections.credential_storage: Cap stores the returned UUID as the key ID; Frame returns the same UUID shape once and stores only SHA-256(key)
security_corrections.active_pointer: Cap's active-ID query does not explicitly constrain ownerId to the actor; Frame requires active-owned before the source-ordered owned/member fallbacks, preventing a corrupt cross-tenant pointer from becoming authority
security_corrections.mint_atomicity: insert, trailing-hour count/delete, postcondition assertion, and assertion cleanup execute in one D1 batch; overflow rolls back without key residue
security_corrections.production_redirect: an empty extension subdomain is rejected and every reachable non-local deployment requires CAP_CHROME_EXTENSION_ID

entitlement.cap_hosted: third-party subscription ID or stripe status active/trialing/complete/paid is Pro
